name: earnings-preview
description: > Generate a pre-earnings briefing for any stock using Yahoo Finance data. Use this skill whenever the user wants to prepare for an upcoming earnings report, understand what analysts expect, review a company's beat/miss track record, or get a quick overview before an earnings call. Triggers include: "earnings preview for AAPL", "what to expect from TSLA earnings", "MSFT reports next week", "earnings preview", "pre-earnings analysis", "what are analysts expecting for NVDA", "earnings estimates fo
author: himself65
summary_zh: 这是一款基于雅虎财经数据生成股票财报简报的工具，帮你在业绩发布前快速摸清分析师预期和历史表现，适合做投资前的突击准备。
